race.description: Share Bets With Tabtouch Bet Loop Maiden
race.comment: SHIMMERY STAR (9) showed good early speed, beaten 2.25 lengths over today's trip at Ascot. Keeps Chris Parnham, and she has more to give. She can find winning form. SPELLBORN (1) resumed with a 1.4L defeat over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside. Settled back from a wide gate and hit the line in good style. Will have to go it the hard way again, but he'll be fitter, and the longer sprint will suit. BOUTIQUE BELLE (10) resumed over 1000m at Ascot, beaten less than 2L as favourite. Was backed off the map, beaten by the same margin over 1200m at Bunbury prior. Loses Pike, but CJP renews his association. ARIZONA SKY (2) resumes for the top barn. Was tipped out following a solid debut and has been well trialled for his return. Draws wide but has to be kept safe.
